The '''Ibian''' is a small amphibious creature native to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], the ibian fed on microscopic [[dust mite]]s and [[Insect/Legends|insects]]. It was in turn preyed upon by the [[Worrt/Legends|worrt]]. These small lifeforms could be recognized by their elongated [[Color/Legends|orange]] and blue bodies, as well as their distinctive eye stalks.<ref name="The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide" /> It is assumed that, like the amphibious [[Gorg/Legends|gorg]], ibians retained moisture by inhabiting abandoned [[Profogg/Legends|profogg]] burrows, as such accounts did exist.
